case_title: AUTOMATIC DATA PROCESSING DBA ADP VS. CARDINAL CAPITAL,LLC et al

docket_entries.description: JUDGE ROBERT DONDERO, CLERK: DIANNE BOFFI /VERA MU, COURT REPORTER: JO ANN BRYCE. REMOVED FROM MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR MAY-17-2004 - CASE SETTLED. ASSIGNED TO PRETRIAL DEPT. 212 ON AUG-03-2004 AT 10:00 AM FOR DISMISSAL PER CRC 225.
CRC 225 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF NOV-02-2004 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
